name: Spotlight Quote Testimonial
description: Hero-sized single testimonial — one customer's voice carries the section. Generous whitespace, large pull-quote typography, calm portrait, and a decorative serif open-quote glyph.

descriptions.descriptive: Two-column editorial layout with the pull-quote left and a 4:5 portrait right on desktop; on mobile the portrait appears as an inline avatar beside the author block. Optional eyebrow, company logo, and caption row. Three tone variants (neutral, muted, inverse) for editorial dark slabs.
descriptions.usage: Use when one customer's voice deserves a full section — a marquee enterprise win, a founder testimonial, or an editorial-style brand quote. Place after a hero or before pricing. Do not stack with other testimonial sections — pick one carrier voice per page.
descriptions.audienceFit: Premium B2B SaaS, agency portfolios, professional-services sites, and editorial-leaning brand pages whose social proof reads better as one strong voice than as a wall of cards.
